title: cyperus ferax var. densiflorus
intro: Cyperus ferax var. densiflorus, also known as the dense-flowered umbrella sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Cyperus ferax var. densiflorus are said to include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and easing respiratory problems, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
